org.ships.vessel.common.types.typical.plane

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.ships.vessel.common.types.typical.AbstractShipsVessel
      • org.ships.vessel.common.types.typical.plane.Plane
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.core.world.position.Positionable<org.core.world.position.impl.BlockPosition>, BlockListable, AirType, CrewStoredVessel, Fallable, FileBasedVessel, FlightPathType, IdentifiableShip, SignBasedVessel, TeleportToVessel, VesselRequirement, WritableNameVessel, ShipsVessel, Vessel

extends AbstractShipsVessel
implements AirType, VesselRequirement, Fallable, FlightPathType
